regulation_name: FDA Rules on Food Supplements and Health Claims
citation: FDA Circular 2013-015 — Guidelines on the Classification of Food Products and Food Supplements
summary: Dietary supplement advertising must not claim to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent disease and must align with FDA-registered product claims.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Supplement, vitamin, or herbal health benefit claims targeting PH consumers. ACTION: WARN — verify against CPR/notification and approved label claims. CHECK: FDA registration, approved claims list, and dosage. ESCALATE IF: Disease treatment or drug-like therapeutic claims.
